text.title: Rate Limiting Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Rate Limiting end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: classify-endpoints
step.action: Group into classes (auth, read, write, admin).

step.name: pick-algorithm
step.action: Pick algorithm per class with rps + burst.

step.name: pick-key
step.action: Pick user_id / tenant_id / api_key for authenticated; ip+UA composite for anonymous.
step.decision-gate: Reject raw per-IP without NAT analysis.

step.name: wire-storage
step.action: Configure backend + TTL matching window; key namespace `ratelimit:{class}:{key}`.

step.name: define-429-and-bypass
step.action: Emit Retry-After + RateLimit-* headers; add bypass list for health/metrics.
step.decision-gate: Reject bypass via prefix; require exact match.
